name: Enable Remote Desktop
description: Enables Remote Desktop (RDP) on the local machine via System Properties. Also adds a Windows Firewall exception for RDP. Run as administrator.
author: sentinel-desktop

params.args: /c reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server" /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f && echo RDP_REGISTRY_SET
/c netsh advfirewall firewall set rule group="remote desktop" new enable=Yes && echo RDP_FIREWALL_ENABLED
/c sc config TermService start= auto && net start TermService && echo RDP_SERVICE_STARTED

steps.description: Ensure Remote Desktop Service is running and set to auto-start
